completed_steps.summary: Archived stale scan state last updated 2026-04-28T00:19:04Z before starting the fresh exhaustive rescan.
Classified repository as a single-part web monolith: React SPA plus Supabase BaaS, Vite build, TypeScript strict, GitHub Pages deployment.
Inventoried project documentation under docs, _bmad-output, tests, and project root; retained docs/index.md as the primary generated entry point.
Resolved installed stack from package-lock.json: React 18.3.1, TypeScript 5.9.3, Vite 6.4.2, Tailwind 4.2.4, Supabase JS 2.104.1, TanStack Query 5.100.1, Vitest 4.1.5, Playwright 1.59.1.

Exhaustively scanned src, supabase, tests, scripts, configs, and workflows; current counts are 108 src source/style files, 97 non-test TS/TSX source files, 46 component files, 12 hook files, 4 contexts, 11 migrations, 9 unit test files, 4 backend-integration files, and 2 active E2E specs.
Regenerated source-tree analysis with current source counts, backend-integration tests, and removal of stale e2e.legacy/playwright-legacy references.
Updated development and operations guidance for test:integration, local-Supabase integration guardrails, and current CI/deploy responsibilities.
Multi-part integration architecture not applicable; repository remains a single React SPA that integrates directly with Supabase.
Regenerated architecture summary for HEAD 4126a49 plus AppContext disabled-query loading-state changes and the expanded testing surface.
Updated supporting docs for package versions, AppContext loading nuance, component/barrel counts, backend-integration tests, and current data-model metadata.
Regenerated master index with current scan date, installed versions, backend-integration command, and PR verification guidance.
Validated generated docs with Prettier check, JSON parse, link resolution, incomplete-marker scan, and git diff whitespace check.
Workflow complete; state file finalized for the exhaustive full rescan.

technology_stack.tech_summary: React 18.3.1, TypeScript 5.9.3 strict, Vite 6.4.2, Tailwind CSS 4.2.4, Supabase JS 2.104.1, TanStack Query 5.100.1, Vitest 4.1.5, Playwright 1.59.1.

batches_completed.summary: Read component inventory and UI surfaces; 46 component TSX files plus 12 historical folder barrels.
Read Auth, App, Sound, Theme contexts plus AppContext regression test; AppContext remains the legacy facade and now uses isLoading for disabled classroom-scoped query loading.
Read 12 hook files and 3 hook test files; four core domains are TanStack-backed while layout presets and seating chart remain legacy.
Read query client/key registry, Supabase client, DB/app type boundaries, utility modules, network status, and synthesized sound definitions.
Read all migrations: 10 public tables, RLS policies, realtime publication changes, replica identity, triggers, and get_student_time_totals RPC.
Read active E2E, backend-integration, support fixtures, helpers, and testing README; integration tests now cover RLS, triggers, realtime DELETE payload, and schema smoke.
Read dev lifecycle, Supabase host detection, bundle DCE check, seeding, migration, and verification scripts.
Read test, deploy, Claude Code, and Claude review workflows; test pipeline runs lint/typecheck, bundle check, sharded E2E, burn-in, and summary, while deploy runs unit tests before Pages build.

resume_instructions: Workflow completed; start a new full rescan if this state becomes stale.
